phase.goal: Phase 01 (closed 2026-03-28): `.planning-archive` removed after migration into public docs; monorepo CLI baseline (`pnpm planning -- --version`, `engines.node >= 22`, documented `pnpm dlx` / workspace exec). Ongoing: keep `.planning/*.xml` aligned with section requirements/state/task-registry MDX; agents read root AGENTS.md first.

Phase 02: define and execute the shared data/storage provider contract so local SQLite plus local files stay first-class, Supabase becomes the first hosted backend for remote data and uploads, and the repo no longer depends on committed `.db` artifacts or Git LFS.

Phase 03: extract `@portfolio/repub-builder` into its own git-installable repo, vendor it back as a submodule workspace dependency, and turn the large-blob audit into explicit rules for what runtime artifacts move to storage/database while SSR-friendly public content stays deterministic.

Phase 04: move the next public catalog surfaces behind SSR-safe Postgres metadata plus storage-backed files, starting with apps, project metadata, resumes, and public download assets, then refresh the public shell around the existing owner-only auth/sidebar contract.

doc-flow.doc: Repo-root stub pointer only -- not canonical prose.
Stub for XML-only tools; points at documentation paths.
